package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_memory_allocation_bytes_buffer_allocated_per_record: Layer: Memory allocation. Flag bytes.Buffer construction per record when a reusable buffer can be reset safely.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule565NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario565Negative(records []Rule565NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
